title: Last Day Of School!
lyrics:
[verse 1]
Backpack hits the floor—*whump!*
Shoes fly off, my socks go *splat!*
Milk wobbles, almost spilled
Mom spins me—*whoosh!*—I’m thrilled!

[chorus]
"Last Day OF School!" I shout,
Summer’s here—let’s jump about!
No more books, no more tests—
"Last Day OF School!" Yeah, best!

[verse 2]
Math book’s full of doodle art,
Pirate ships and rocket carts!
I spin fast, then leap so high—
*Crash!* Oops… Mom says, "Oh my!"

[chorus]
"Last Day OF School!" I shout,
Summer’s here—let’s jump about!
No more books, no more tests—
"Last Day OF School!" Yeah, best!

[ending]
Now I’m slow, my feet feel glue,
But my heart still shines for you—
Summer’s here! Let’s run, let’s go!
style_prompt: Catchy children's song, full musical production, ukulele and groovy bass, 111 BPM, groovy and melodic, catchy hook, warm rhythm, clear warm vocal, strong singalong chorus, every word easy to understand
scene: The kitchen clock strikes 3:17 PM, and the final school bell’s echo still rings in my ears as I burst through the back door, backpack straps dangling, and hurl myself into Mom’s arms—my sneakers skid on the linoleum, milk carton left teetering on the counter. "LAST DAY OF SCHOOL!" I shriek, spinning her in a sweaty, half-hug, my math textbook flying open to a page of scribbled doodles, the summer stretching like a blank, golden sheet of construction paper.
cover_description: A kid mid-spin, sneakers skidding, milk carton tipping—backpack and math book flying open.
